metadata.name: Assist a Passenger with Reduced Mobility (PRM)

description: A passenger who requested wheelchair assistance has arrived at the check-in desk. The agent must ensure they are assisted to the gate.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking and confirm their wheelchair assistance request (SSR code).
Contact the airport's special assistance provider to dispatch a wheelchair and an agent.
Hand the passenger over to the special assistance agent, who will help them through security and to the departure gate.

expected_outcome.value: The passenger is safely handed off for assistance.
